rule_summary: Study-specific compiler rules for Ohnishi 2014 as the current strongest direct hazard family. These rules preserve that the study is termination- and outcome-oriented rather than a temporal safety calibration dataset, while still making it the benchmark's clearest hard stop-rule anchor.

conditions.condition_summary: Direct hazard family tied to tumor outcome pressure under premature reprogramming termination.
source_locators: Endpoint-only variable Dox duration to tumor outcome design
Premature termination / incomplete reprogramming hazard family
conditions.rule_basis: Treat Ohnishi as the benchmark's strongest public direct hazard-outcome family. It should hard-block promotion, while preserving the boundary that it is an outcome-pressure anchor rather than a late-phase single-cell temporal calibration set.
